scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/background.ts src/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --target=es2022 && cp src/manifest.json src/about.html dist/ && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs
scripts.watch: mkdir -p dist && cp src/manifest.json src/about.html dist/ && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && esbuild src/background.ts src/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --target=es2022 --watch
scripts.release: npm run build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./src/manifest.json').version") && rm -f "monochromatic-v$VERSION.zip" && (cd dist && zip -r "../monochromatic-v$VERSION.zip" .)
